tagline: Your Trusted Partner in Pool Care and Maintenance

hero.headline:
Nashville's Pool Pro at Your
Service
hero.subheadline: Your pool should be the best part of your day, not a weekend chore. Just Poolin' handles every detail so you can skip the chemicals and cannonball straight in.

services.label: Our Pool Services
services.headline: Pool Care Tailored to<br class="hidden md:block"> Your Nashville Home
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to emergency green pool rescues, we handle it all so your backyard stays swim-ready every single day.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly cleaning, skimming, vacuuming, chemical balancing, and equipment checks to keep your pool sparkling all season long.

cards.title: Green Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Pool turned swamp-green? We bring it back to crystal-clear with expert algae elimination and full chemical rebalancing — fast.

cards.title: Pool Opening
cards.description: Seasonal opening done right: cover removal, chemistry balancing, equipment prep, and a complete system inspection so you're swim-ready on day one.

cards.title: Pool Closing & Winterization
cards.description: Full winterization including thorough cleaning, chemical treatment, equipment care, and cover installation to protect your pool all winter.

cards.title: Hot Tub Maintenance
cards.description: Professional spa cleaning and water balancing that keeps your hot tub pristine, safe, and ready for relaxation year-round.

cards.title: Airbnb Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Specialized service for rental property owners. We keep your pool guest-ready and properly maintained between every booking.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Stress-Free Pool

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Reach out by phone or form. We'll ask a few questions about your pool and schedule a free on-site inspection at a time that works for you.

steps.title: Hunter Handles the Rest
steps.description: Our certified owner-operator arrives on time, every time. Cleaning, chemistry, equipment — every detail is handled with care and expertise.

steps.title: Dive In and Relax
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all season. If anything is ever off, we come back and make it right — no questions asked.

about.label: Why Nashville Trusts Us
about.headline: Owner-Operated, Personally Delivered Pool Care
about.description: Just Poolin' was founded by Hunter in 2024 with one simple mission: make your pool the highlight of your day. As an owner-operated business, every visit gets the same hands-on attention and certified expertise. We serve Nashville's finest neighborhoods including Belle Meade, Green Hills, and East Nashville — treating every pool like it's our own.

features.title: Owner on Every Job
features.description: Hunter personally handles your service — no rotating crews, no strangers. You get consistent, accountable care every single visit.

features.title: Certified Water Chemistry Experts
features.description: Precise chemical balancing that keeps your water safe, clear, and gentle on skin. No guesswork, just science.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with a visit? We come back and redo it at no charge. Your satisfaction is the only metric that matters.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your pool. Flexible options, honest rates — no hidden fees or long-term contracts.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, we'll come back and redo it completely free of charge. No fine print, no runaround. Hunter personally stands behind every visit because your pool deserves nothing less than perfect.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in the Nashville area are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer next-day response. Just call Hunter directly and we'll get you on the schedule fast.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all! Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you're away. You'll get a service update after each visit so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: Do you service Airbnb and rental properties?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in keeping rental property pools guest-ready at all times. We coordinate with your booking schedule to ensure the pool is pristine for every arrival.

faqs.question: What areas of Nashville do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Belle Meade, Green Hills, East Nashville, West Meade, Sylvan Park, Franklin, Brentwood, Mount Juliet, Forest Hills, and surrounding Nashville communities.

faqs.question: Do you offer hot tub maintenance too?
faqs.answer: Yes! We provide full hot tub cleaning and maintenance services including water chemistry balancing, filter cleaning, and sanitization to keep your spa ready for relaxation year-round.

testimonials.name: Maranda H.
testimonials.text: Hunter is a very professional hard working young man. He's always open to my ideas and questions about our pool. So appreciated!

testimonials.name: Nextdoor Reviewer
testimonials.text: Hunter has done a great job servicing our pool and treated it like his own! Would highly recommend Just Poolin'.

testimonials.name: Nashville Homeowner
testimonials.text: Finally found a pool service that actually shows up on time and does thorough work. Hunter treats our pool like it's his own backyard. Highly recommend to anyone in the Nashville area.

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure quote from Hunter himself. No contracts, no commitments — just honest pricing for Nashville's best pool care.
